rationale: Locale bug: double.Parse ignores InvariantCulture with Decimal128; C#-specific implementation issue, no BSON spec rule about locale.
Resync read/write concern spec tests to add new concern levels; child of DRIVERS-567 coordination ticket.
Updates command monitoring and retryable write YAML test format; child of DRIVERS-480 spec test rollout.
Updates mongos pinning test expectation for MaxTimeoutMSExpired; child of DRIVERS-764 coordination ticket.
Pool endlessly creates connections on auth failure with minPoolSize; no specific CMAP spec rule about stopping infinite retries.
Default BsonSerializationArgs null NominalType causes unwanted _t discriminator; C#-specific serializer bug, no spec rule.
Build config fix: xunit.runner.json copy policy set to Always; no driver behavior or spec involvement.
Improvement implementing CSFLE spec change: connect to mongocryptd via TCP per DRIVERS-778; not a bug in prior behavior.
SDAM spec requires HeartbeatTimeout to work; async Socket methods ignore ReceiveTimeout, making the configured timeout ineffective.
Race condition in TcpStreamFactory returning closed Socket; internal timing bug, no contradicted spec rule.
BsonClassMap.LookupClassMap inconsistently handles private parameterless constructors; C#-specific serializer implementation bug.
User question about custom serializer not being respected; resolved Done (not Fixed); no identified spec violation.
Removing System.Reflection.Emit dependency for .NET Standard compatibility; platform build fix, no spec involvement.
Adding .NET Standard 2.0 platform support; build and packaging improvement, no spec behavior involved.
CI test configuration: add certificates to Windows system store for TLS testing; infrastructure, not spec behavior.
Improvement to verify opcode during decode; no specific wire protocol spec rule cited, and issuetype is Improvement.
Improvement: prefer connectionId from isMaster response (4.2+) instead of getLastError; new behavior, not fixing wrong existing behavior.
Bug in async JSON-driven test runner: ActAsync not overridden so exceptions are swallowed; test infrastructure fix.
Documentation/website fix for incorrect download links on landing page; no driver behavior or spec involved.
SCRAM-SHA auth uses non-ordinal string comparison; SCRAM RFC requires byte-exact comparison, locale can cause auth failures.
Retryable writes spec: txnNumber requires lsid; driver sent txnNumber without sessionId for unacknowledged writes, causing silent data loss.
Improvement implementing spec requirement: raise error for hint on unacknowledged update (DRIVERS-790); prior behavior not wrong.
Improvement: bump wire protocol version for MongoDB 4.4 support per DRIVERS-725; routine version update.
Improvement: expand error labels for retryable writes per DRIVERS-525; implementing new spec behavior.
Improve testing around default writeConcern per DRIVERS-440; component Testing, coordinated spec test rollout.
User support question about sudden connection increase; resolved Done with no fix version applied.
Deprecating mapReduce arguments per DRIVERS-711; routine feature deprecation, not a bug fix.
Adding diagnostic properties to ServerDescription for SDAM debugging; internal enhancement with no spec behavior changed.
Implementing $out to S3 support per DRIVERS-733; new feature improvement, not fixing wrong existing behavior.
Test cleanup fix: test creates unique indexes but does not remove them, causing other tests to fail.
Deadlock report with Atlas using unacknowledged writes; resolved Done with no fix version; user support question.
Adding URI option to disable OCSP certificate revocation checking; improvement related to SPEC-1595, resolved Done with no fix.
Broad internal refactor to ensure StringComparison.Ordinal used throughout driver; code quality improvement.
MongoWriteException encoding error with collation locale; internal error message handling bug, no spec rule violated.
DNS exception from third-party DnsClient library in AKS; resolved Done; not a MongoDB driver spec issue.
User question about IgnoreIfDefault not working; resolved Done (not Fixed); no identified spec violation.
Improvement implementing change stream resumability whitelist per DRIVERS-907; new spec requirement, not fixing wrong prior behavior.
Improvement ensuring WriteConcernError errInfo propagation per DRIVERS-967; implementing new spec requirement.
Internal code fix: Ensure.IsNotNull calls missing parameter name argument; minor code quality improvement.
BSON deserialization fails adding array member to schema; internal serializer edge case, no specific spec rule violated.
SRV DNS resolution exception in AKS caused by third-party DnsClient library bug; not a MongoDB spec issue.
SDAM spec requires removing an invalid server from the cluster; driver only removed it from the cluster description.
Change stream throws InvalidOperationException on documents with duplicate BSON element names; internal serializer edge case.
Improvement implementing hint for delete command per DRIVERS-908; new spec feature, not fixing wrong prior behavior.
ArgumentException error message shows wrong type name; internal code quality fix, no spec behavior involved.
Implementing $accumulator aggregation stage per DRIVERS-906; new feature addition, not a spec conformance fix.
Retryable writes spec: txnNumber requires lsid; driver included txnNumber without session when mongos instances were inconsistent.
DnsClient.LookupClient should be singleton per library docs; internal resource optimization, no spec behavior.
Deprecating geoHaystack and geoSearch per DRIVERS-987; routine feature deprecation, not a bug fix.
Cursor spec: getMore must use namespace from cursor response; Find and Aggregate used original namespace, breaking Atlas Data Lake.
